title: 皐月賞の後に・師に捧げる栄冠

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Not yet... Not just yet... At the pace I'm running,
the moment to strike is...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: NOW!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Ignite! Burn, my competitive spirit! Become my
strength!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Leading at the moment is Yaeno Muteki! Here she
comes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: A dance of flames.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
For an instant, her fighting spirit was as an
inferno, flaring up high enough to incinerate the
very sky.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Is that what she's keeping bottled up?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki has won the Satsuki Sho! The first
race of the Classic Triple Crown is hers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (...Ah! Right, the winner's circle!)

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Holy moly! That was unbelievable! How can
nobody know who she is when she's so good?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You're amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
You'll be at the Japanese Derby as well, right? I'm
looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (They're acknowledging my skill...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (All these people are acknowledging me!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stands erupt in unanimous applause in
response to Yaeno Muteki's exclamation of
gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sob... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But only those who fight have the privilege of
lamenting defeat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I do not even have that right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However, I will shine bright at the Japanese
Derby...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No matter how heavy the price I must pay.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm back.
choice_data_list: Congratulations on winning the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't have done it without your guidance.
You have my heartfelt gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A great number of people applauded me while I
was standing in the winner's circle.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As I was showered in that thunderous applause, it
became undeniably clear to me...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That the path I've been following was not a
mistake.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No, choosing to make use of my competitive
spirit was definitely the right choice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As was learning to temper my fierce blaze with
the stillness of water.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have undoubtedly chosen the right path. I would
hope I've shown as much growth as I feel I have,
but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She used to be unable to control her competitive
rage even in friendly competition. But now she
can remain calm when the stakes are high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the principle of blaze fierce and water
still, she's learned to analyze her surroundings
and adapt in a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that these things are undeniable proof of
her growth.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Then I must strive to better myself even further.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is up next. Please continue
to lend me your strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We make it back to the academy, and just as
we're about to part ways, a thought suddenly
comes to me.
choice_data_list:
Your grandparents must be very happy with
you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Who knows? They might not even know of my
victory.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No. They were unable to come because there was
a class at the dojo at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe my ears. Unable to help myself, I
remind her that she said her intent was to show
her grandparents how much she's grown.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I am but a fledgling who still needs to mature. The
time to show them my running is still on the
horizon.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As long as I keep winning, I'm sure the chance for
them to watch will come.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I'm fine with them not coming to watch me
until I've bested a good number of foes and
conquered the entire Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the looks of it, she probably won't even tell
them about how she did today. That would be
such a shame!
choice_data_list: In that case, I'll notify them of your results.
In that case, I'll notify them of your results.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And this is because reporting to my guardians is
part of your duty as my trainer, I presume?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Then, I can't stop you. It would pain me to
see you rebuked for shirking your duty.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Feel free to call them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having received Yaeno Muteki's permission, I dial
the number to her family's residence.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Good day, Trainer. I hope that my granddaughter
hasn't been causing you much trouble.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I summarize the circumstances leading up to the
sudden phone call and explain that Yaeno Muteki
has just won the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: ...So it really happened.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
To be frank, I watched the race on TV during my
break, but the reality still hasn't sunk in...
choice_data_list: It is reality, though! She really did win!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! So it's true after all!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
That she was even able to compete in the Satsuki
Sho is already a great honor in itself... But this...
this is like a dream.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Despite this victory, she still has a long way to go.
Her battle is not over yet.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
As always, I entrust Yaeno to your care. I wish you
both a warrior's luck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After receiving congratulations and words of
appreciation from each and every one of Yaeno
Muteki's family members, I hang up.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer, forgive me for what I said earlier.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe Grampa was that excited... and
that he actually watched me...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall use all of those words of encouragement as
motivation to achieve victory at the Japanese
Derby!
